BTC.reasoning: Setup coerente con flat: forte segnale bearish da prezzo/SMA (0.98) bilanciato da RSI oversold, taker buy e Extreme Fear. Fear & Greed pesato come contrarian ma offset da long crowded (2.08) e OI in calo; conflitto tra momentum ribassista e rimbalzo oversold impedisce directional bias.

USDCV.reasoning: Setup coerente ma fragile: long su stablecoin-like con mosse minime e derivati assenti. Extreme Fear pesato come contrarian ma senza OI/funding/taker per confermare vs momentum; dati mancanti generano conflict. Abbasso conviction di 1.

BEAT.reasoning: Setup fragile: Extreme Fear (global F&G=8) is overridden by +282% 7d / +87% 24h pump near ATH and falling OI, turning the contrarian long into momentum chase with exhaustion risk. Derivatives mixed (positive funding vs. rising shorts). Conflict dominates; conviction cut sharply.

REUR.reasoning: Extreme Fear (FNG=8, persistent) correctly read as contrarian for long. RSI 30.7 reinforces oversold condition; +12% rel strength vs BTC confirms outperformance. No derivatives contradict. Setup coherent, no adjustment needed.
